series_metadata.series_description: File contains emergency response incidents to include date, location, material involved, fire department, damages, personnel and action taken.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area 2 years, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy. ; Microform: Retain diazo copy in operating area permanently. Retain master microfilm in off site storage permanently., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
